root: ^Great job! The train arrived on time and we now have more commissions of trains that want to go to Sörena
^There is going to be one from Ariëta followed by one from Esïe, this sounds like a great opportunity to practice junctions
^If you overlaps two rails going in different directions, a junction will appear from them!
^The blue line will then show the direction of the junction, you change this direction by doing a right click with the configure tool
^Make sure it's linking both where the train is coming from and to where it's going to! If it's not also linked to the source the train will derail!
